example: I've been a photography enthusiast for about three years.
I've never gotten tired of discovering the realm of photography.
Photography is a medium for creativity.
I remember learning about the exposure triangle when I first started out.
ja: 露出の三角形（写真用語）

example: I had to learn about composition in photography.
The use of lenses fascinates me.
This is the Pentax M28 millimeter wide angle lens.
Because of its wide aperture, I was able to capture exquisite scenery.
The background is quite blurred with the 50 millimeter lens.
Each lens puts me under different perspectives.
Our inner world is affected by subjective experience.
Our subjective experience forms a sense of bias.
Reappraisal involves reframing the meaning of a situation.
Reappraisal is an emotion regulation method.
Your ego might not be able to comprehend otherwise.
Reinvent yourself into a more open-minded person.
We're caught up in the autopilot mode on our phones.
zh: 自動駕駛模式，比喻無意識狀態
ja: 自動操縦モード（比喩的に無意識の状態）

example: This challenges our own self awareness journey.
